ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the neighborhood (e.g., downtown, suburban) */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Polygon geometry representing the boundary of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_coords" TEXT /* Central coordinates of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_cleansed" TEXT /* Cleaned name of the neighborhood (for consistent display) */,
  "id_count" INTEGER /* Number of features (e.g., properties, businesses) in the neighborhood */,
  "coords" TEXT /* Coordinates of a specific point within the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* The area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "total_housing_units" INTEGER /* The total number of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "total_businesses" INTEGER /* The total number of businesses in the neighborhood */,
  "total_parks" INTEGER /* The total number of parks in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the neighborhood data was last updated */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* The average property value in the neighborhood */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* The average rent in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* The crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_accessibility" REAL /* A score indicating the accessibility of public transport in the neighborhood */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of the neighborhood that is green space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_neighborhood_group FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_group") REFERENCES neighborhood_groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood group */,
  "population_density" REAL /* The average population density of neighborhoods in the group */,
  "average_income" REAL /* The average income of residents in the group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* The average age of residents in the group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the neighborhood group data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the feature is located */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., property, business, park) */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "property_value" REAL /* The value of the property (if the feature is a property) */,
  "rent" REAL /* The rent of the property (if the feature is a property) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A rating of the feature (e.g., for businesses) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the feature data was last updated */,
  "public_transport_distance" REAL /* The distance to the nearest public transport stop */,
  "green_space_distance" REAL /* The distance to the nearest green space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, urban planner, community member) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the neighborhood data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser or device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the neighborhood */,
  "ethnicity_breakdown" TEXT /* A JSON string containing the breakdown of ethnicities in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* A JSON string containing the breakdown of education levels in the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* The unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* The poverty rate in the neighborhood */,
  "healthcare_accessibility" REAL /* A score indicating the accessibility of healthcare in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
